    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Method MergeBuffers

    MergeBuffers()

    Merges all the instances into a single big one.

    Declaration
    public void MergeBuffers()
    Remarks

    When merging the buffers, it also adjusts the BufferView offsets so the data they point to remains the same.

    If images are required to be included in the binary, call before calling MergeBuffers().

    Exceptions
    Type Condition
    InvalidOperationException

    .Net arrays have an upper limit of 2Gb, so this is the biggest a buffer can normally grow, so attempting to merge buffers that sum more than 2Gb will throw this exception.

    MergeBuffers(int)

    Merges all the instances into buffers of maxSize size.

    Declaration
    public void MergeBuffers(int maxSize)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    int maxSize

    The maximum size of each buffer. Notice that if a single BufferView is larger than maxSize, that buffer will be also larger.
